args:
Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Routing Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/router/trie-router/node.ts' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Routing Read/Write Ledger

## src/hono.ts

- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point. Extends HonoBase with default SmartRouter config.
- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, HonoOptions.
- Simple note: Constructor sets router to SmartRouter wrapping RegExpRouter and TrieRouter unless options override it.

## src/hono-base.ts

- Purpose: Base Hono class implementing request handling, routing dispatch, middleware support.
- Names noticed: HonoBase, Context, Router, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, getPath, mergePath, compose, notFoundHandler, errorHandler.
- Simple note: Handles GET/POST/PUT/DELETE/OPTIONS/PATCH/ALL methods via #addRoute. #dispatch uses router.match to find handlers. Supports .route(), .basePath(), .mount().

## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Exports PatternRouter from sub module.
- Names noticed: PatternRouter.
- Simple note: Index re-export file.

## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts

- Purpose: PatternRouter implements regex-based routing with named params and wildcards.
- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Router, Params, Result, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, Route, emptyParams.
- Simple note: Converts path patterns like /:id or /:id{name} to RegExps during add(). match() loops routes array and execs RegExps.

## src/router/linear-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Exports LinearRouter from sub module.
- Names noticed: LinearRouter.
- Simple note: Index re-export file.

## src/router/linear-router/router.ts

- Purpose: LinearRouter implements linear iteration matching with optional param handling.
- Names noticed: LinearRouter, Router, Params, Result, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, RegExpMatchArrayWithIndices, ROUTES_LOOP.
- Simple note: Stores routes as [method, path, handler] array. match() loops sequentially. Handles wildcards (*), labels (:name), and optional parameters via checkOptionalParameter.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Exports RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter from sub module.
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams.
- Simple note: Index re-exports router class and prepared router for serialization.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts

- Purpose: RegExpRouter builds RegEx matchers from routes for fast matching.
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, Router, ParamIndexMap, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, match, emptyParam, PATH_ERROR, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, HandlerWithMetadata, Trie.
- Simple note: Uses Trie internally to build composite RegExp. add() fills #middleware and #routes maps. buildAllMatchers() constructs matcher via buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts

- Purpose: Defines Matcher interface and match function for RegExpRouter.
- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, Result, Router, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, match, emptyParam, ParamStash.
- Simple note: match() function builds matchers on first call, caches them. Returns [[handler, params][], ParamStash].

## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts

- Purpose: PreparedRegExpRouter enables runtime-safe router generation for edge runtimes.
- Names notice: PreparedRegExpRouter, RegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, RelocateMap.
- Simple note: Takes pre-built matchers and relocateMap in constructor. add() looks up path in relocateMap and updates matcher slots. serializeInitParams converts matchers to JSON string with embedded RegEx.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts

- Purpose: Node class builds trie structure for route patterns.
- Names noticed: Node, ParamAssocArray, Context, PATH_ERROR, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, regExpMetaChars.
- Simple note: insert() walks tokens array and creates child nodes keyed by regexp pattern strings. buildRegExpStr() returns alternation pattern of all children.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts

- Purpose: Trie class tokenizes paths and calls Node to build structure.
- Names noticed: Trie, Context, Node, ParamAssocArray, ReplacementMap, PATH_ERROR.
- Simple note: insert() strips braces from paths before tokenizing. buildRegExp() transforms trie to [RegExp, indexReplacementMap, paramReplacementMap].

## src/router/smart-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Exports SmartRouter from sub module.
- Names noticed: SmartRouter.
- Simple note: Index re-export file.

## src/router/smart-router/router.ts

- Purpose: SmartRouter wraps multiple routers and picks best one per request.
- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, Result, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError.
- Simple note: add() stores routes until match time. match() tries each router in order, catches UnsupportedPathError, and keeps last successful router. Active router accessible via activeRouter getter.

## src/router/trie-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Exports TrieRouter from sub module.
- Names noticed: TrieRouter.
- Simple note: Index re-export file.

## src/router/trie-router/router.ts

- Purpose: TrieRouter implements tree-based routing with method branching.
- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Router, Node, checkOptionalParameter, Params, Result.
- Simple note: Node class has #children map keyed by path segment. insert() traverses tree. match() walks tree matching segments.

## src/router/trie-router/node.ts

- Purpose: Node class for TrieRouter tree structure.
- Names noticed: Node, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, Params, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, emptyParams, hasChildren.
- Simple note: Each node holds #children, #methods array with method->handler maps, and #patterns for wildcards. search() queues nodes and matches path segments.

## src/router/common.case.test.ts

- Purpose: Shared test suite for all routers with common behaviors.
- Names noticed: runTest, RunnerTestSuite, ParamIndexMap, Params, Router.
- Simple note: Describes basic usage, reserved words, complex patterns, multi-match, optional params, ALL method, star wildcards, and parameter ordering tests.

## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests PatternRouter specific behaviors and edge cases.
- Names noticed: PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest.
- Simple note: Runs common tests with skip for UnsupportedPathError cases. Tests trailing slash handling separately.

## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests LinearRouter specific behaviors and limitations.
- Names noticed: LinearRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest.
- Simple note: Skips complex multi-match and regexp tests. Tests trailing slash separately. Tests skip part behavior for :id{d+} pattern.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests RegExpRouter specific behaviors and ambiguities.
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, ParamStash, ParamIndexMap, UnsupportedPathError, runTest.
- Simple note: Tests return value type with ParamStash. Tests UnsupportedPathError for ambiguous patterns like /:user/entries vs /entry/:name.

## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests SmartRouter fallback behavior across backend routers.
- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest.
- Simple note: Runs common test suite with SmartRouter wrapping RegExpRouter and TrieRouter.

## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests TrieRouter basic routing capabilities.
- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest.
- Simple note: Runs common test suite with no skips. Tests full common case suite.

## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests Node class low-level trie operations directly.
- Names noticed: Node, search, insert, Params.
- Simple note: Tests root node behavior, wildcard *, named params, regex patterns, ALL method, multi-match ordering, sorting, duplicate param names, and fallback routing.

## Cross-File Checklist

- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
